segments.text: Prineville homes, year-to-date 2026. At twelve months of supply, buyers hold the cards.
four twenty-nine thousand dollars this year, up 4 point 6 percent from last year.
sixty-eight days to contract. six days slower than last year.
Sellers getting 97 point 8 percent of ask. Negotiation is limited. Pricing has been firm.
412 homes active. A lot of supply, not enough buyers pulling the trigger.
Full report at ryan-realty.com. Subscribe for monthly updates.
